name: Character Generator Plus
short_description: A user-friendly tool that enables you to effortlessly create thousands of unique character sprite sheets for your games or projects.
detailed_description:
A user-friendly tool that enables you to effortlessly create thousands of unique character sprite sheets for your games or projects. The exports are compatible with RPG Maker MV and can also be used in other engines. Below are some special features of this software:

1. It can batch generate sprite sheets randomly.

2. It has an added component inspection feature, which conveniently allows you to check the related image resources of a certain component, as well as copy and modify them.

3. Some components have an added random color selection function, enabling you to choose your favorite color freely.

4. It has an added animation preview function, allowing you to preview the animation effects in advance.

5. It supports importing RPG Maker Engine generator resources for use.
